 def test_shared_param_prefers_first_default(runner):
     """The first ``default=True`` wins when multiple ``flag_value`` options share
     a parameter name, regardless of which positional option carries it.
@@
     result = runner.invoke(prefers_red, [])
     assert "red" in result.output
     result = runner.invoke(prefers_red, ["--green"])
     assert "green" in result.output
 
 
+def test_callable_flag_value_default_true_and_show_default(runner):
+    class Factory:
+        def __init__(self):
+            raise AssertionError("should not be instantiated")
+
+    @click.command()
+    @click.option("--factory", flag_value=Factory, default=True, show_default=True)
+    def cli(factory):
+        click.echo(factory is Factory)
+
+    result = runner.invoke(cli, [], default_map={"factory": True})
+    assert not result.exception
+    assert result.output == "True\n"
+
+    result = runner.invoke(cli, ["--help"], default_map={"factory": True})
+    assert not result.exception
+    assert "default:" in result.output
+
+
 @pytest.mark.parametrize(
     ("default_map", "key", "expected"),
     [
         # Key present in default_map.
         ({"email": "a@b.com"}, "email", "a@b.com"),
